[[General/Legends|General]] '''Fefar Blackeye''' was a one-eyed [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]], who led a rebellion on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. However, he was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Popular legend had it that an Imperial commander trapped him in a copse and waited until sunset. When it came, Blackeye, in the manner of his people, was overcome with an urge to bray loudly, thus revealing himself. Blackeye later committed suicide in after spending six months in a zoo cage on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and with his [[Death/Legends|death]], the rebellion broke apart.
